name: Crocodile & Mihawk
effectText:
[On Play] Draw 2 cards and trash 1 card from your hand. Then, play up to 1 "Cross Guild" type Character card with a cost of 4 or less from your hand.
[Once Per Turn] If your "Cross Guild" type Character would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may trash 1 card from your hand instead.

name: Alvida
effectText:
If you have 2 or more Characters with a base cost of 5 or more, this Character gains +1 cost.
[On Play] If your Leader is [Buggy], draw 3 cards and trash 2 cards from your hand.

name: Buggy
effectText: [Activate:Main] You may trash 1 card from your hand and trash this Character: If your Leader is [Buggy], play up to 1 "Cross Guild" type Character card with a cost of 6 or less from your hand.

name: Cabaji
effectText:
If you have 2 or more Characters with a base cost of 5 or more, this Character gains [Blocker] and +1 cost.
(After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)
[Opponent's Turn] This Character gains +5000 power.

name: Mohji
effectText:
If you have 2 or more Characters with a base cost of 5 or more, this Character gains [Blocker] and +1 cost.
(After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)
[On K.O.] If your Leader is [Buggy] and you have 3 or less cards in your hand, draw 1 card.

name: Buggy (OP09-042)
effectText: [Activate: Main] You may rest 5 of your DON!! cards and trash 1 card from your hand: Play up to 1 "Cross Guild" type Character card from your hand.

name: Buggy (Reprint)
effectText:
[On Play] Place up to 1 of your opponent's Characters at the bottom of the owner's deck. Then, if you do not have 5 Characters with a cost of 5 or more, place this Character at the bottom of the owner's deck.

DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP09 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.

name: Cross Guild (Reprint)
effectText:
[Main] Look at 4 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 "Cross Guild" type card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
[Trigger] Activate this card's [Main] effect.

DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP09 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.

name: Mr.3(Galdino) (Reprint)
effectText: [On Play] Look at 4 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 "Cross Guild" type card or card with a type including "Baroque Works" other than [Mr.3(Galdino)] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP09 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.

name: Cabaji (Reprint)
effectText:
If you have a [Buggy] or [Mohji] Character, this Character cannot be K.O.'d in battle.

DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP09 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.

name: Mr.1(Daz.Bonez) (Reprint)
effectText: DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP09 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.

name: Alvida (Reprint)
effectText: [On K.O.] If your Leader has the "Cross Guild" type, play up to 1 Character card with a cost of 5 or less other than [Alvida] from your hand.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP09 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.

name: Mohji (Reprint)
effectText: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 [Richie] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order and play up to 1 [Richie] from your hand.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP09 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.

name: Richie (Reprint)
effectText:
[Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP09 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.
